component.name: Phlox
component.summary: Open-source AI scribe with patient management

description.p: Phlox is a free, open-source, AI scribe with a built-in patient management system and agentic AI capabilities. It is designed as a local-first alternative to SaaS medical scribes that runs entirely on your own hardware with no third-party services — all data stays local.

Key features include ambient note generation, adaptive refinement from previous notes, a flexible template system, MCP server support for external tools, and document processing via vision language models.
The desktop app comes bundled with both transcription (parakeet.cpp) and LLM inference (llama.cpp) engines using the Vulkan backend for GPU acceleration on AMD, Intel, and NVIDIA hardware.

v2.0.0: patient_profiles split from encounters, MCP server support, vision-enhanced document processing, and the adaptive-refinement feedback loop. Bundled llama.cpp and parakeet.cpp sidecars with Vulkan acceleration.
First Flatpak release. Includes Vulkan GPU acceleration via Mesa Vulkan drivers from the Freedesktop 24.08 runtime.
